revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-5-250

A component of a moment at a section of a structural member, in the plane of that section and resulting from all external forces to one side of that section.

{{IALAFooter}}
